text.title: Product Explainability Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Product Explainability plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: The product KB MUST emit schema.org Product + SoftwareApplication markup with name, description, featureList, applicationCategory, and offers; missing fields fail validation.
rule.rationale: AI discovery surfaces (Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT) parse schema markup to summarise products; missing markup makes the product invisible to the discovery layer.

rule.statement: Every feature page MUST list explicit limits ('what this does NOT do') alongside capabilities; capability-only pages are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Capability-only pages cause hallucinated answers in AI surfaces ('it does X' when X is the unsupported edge); explicit boundaries are the only structural prevention.

rule.statement: Public KB pages MUST score ≤ Flesch-Kincaid grade 11; jargon-heavy pages MUST be rewritten or moved behind login.
rule.rationale: AI summarisers degrade on jargon-heavy text; sub-grade-11 prose summarises predictably across surfaces.

rule.statement: Every product MUST publish a machine-readable changelog (RSS + JSON Feed) listing feature changes, deprecations, and limit changes within 24h of release.
rule.rationale: Without machine-readable changelogs, AI surfaces serve stale capability claims; changelogs are the canonical update channel.

rule.statement: Every KB page MUST carry a frontmatter owner + review-cadence (quarterly default); pages past review-date with no owner MUST be unpublished.
rule.rationale: Unowned KB rots; the explicit owner + cadence pair is the only durable freshness gate.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
